author: sleepyhauru
description: Replies with "No fuck you" when someone says "fuck you", with configurable odds.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load nofuckyou`. It starts disabled; enable it with `[p]nofuckyou enable`.
short: Replies to "fuck you" with configurable odds.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild configuration settings. It does not store user data.
